description: You are a Telephony Architect designing a new Interactive Voice Response (IVR) system for Coastal Bank. Create a call flow diagram in diagrams.net (draw.io) based on the functional specification provided in '~/Desktop/ivr_spec.txt'. The diagram must accurately model the logic including Time of Day checks, Account Validation with a retry counter (max 3 attempts), Menu Options, and Error Handling using standard flowchart symbols and labeled connectors. Save the source file to '~/Diagrams/banking_ivr.drawio' and export the final diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/exports/banking_ivr.pdf'.
